prestazioni: 2UR-GSE 5.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine: Full bolt-on package with HKS Hi-Power 4.5-inch titanium exhaust (LC500-specific cat-back system), Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel headers (equal-length, 1.75-inch primaries), and Apexi Power Intake (carbon fiber intake box with high-flow filter, designed for the 2UR-GSE’s MAF housing).

Forced induction via HKS GT-SS supercharger kit (2.3L twin-scroll centrifugal, 8-10 psi boost, intercooled with custom Setrab 40-row core) paired with a Motec M150 ECU (standalone, OEM CAN bus integration, flex-fuel capable) and upgraded fuel system (Walbro 450 LPH dual pumps, ID1000 injectors, and Radium Engineering fuel surge tank).

Chassis reinforcement with Cusco Type-RS 4-point strut tower bar (LC500-specific, aluminum construction), Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm adjustable front, 18mm rear), and Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm stroke, LC500-specific valving with pillowball mounts).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS LC500 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks) paired with a custom Vortex Generators carbon fiber rear wing (3D-scanned for optimal downforce at 120+ mph).

VMR V710 20x10.5 ET30 (front) and 20x12 ET40 (rear) wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear), wrapped in a custom PPF matte satin finish (XPEL Stealth with ceramic coating).

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III LC500-specific seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, TIG-welded, integrated with OEM airbag sensors).
